'''âp-p-n''' ('''kapapan''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:photoevaporate|photoevaporate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-p-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:photoevaporate|photoevaporate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âp-p-n
|-
! Lemma
| kapapan
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thipapan|thipapan]] || [[word:jipapan|jipapan]] || [[word:shipapan|shipapan]] || [[word:kipapan|kipapan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthupapan|thuthupapan]] || [[word:jujupapan|jujupapan]] || [[word:shushupapan|shushupapan]] || [[word:kukupapan|kukupapan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thupapan|thupapan]] || [[word:jupapan|jupapan]] || [[word:shupapan|shupapan]] || [[word:kupapan|kupapan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thupapan|thupapan]] || [[word:jupapan|jupapan]] || [[word:shupapan|shupapan]] || [[word:kupapan|kupapan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thepapan|thepapan]] || [[word:jepapan|jepapan]] || [[word:shepapan|shepapan]] || [[word:kepapan|kepapan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothopapan|thothopapan]] || [[word:jojopapan|jojopapan]] || [[word:shoshopapan|shoshopapan]] || [[word:kokopapan|kokopapan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thopapan|thopapan]] || [[word:jopapan|jopapan]] || [[word:shopapan|shopapan]] || [[word:kopapan|kopapan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thopapan|thopapan]] || [[word:jopapan|jopapan]] || [[word:shopapan|shopapan]] || [[word:kopapan|kopapan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠpapan|thĂŠpapan]] || [[word:jĂŠpapan|jĂŠpapan]] || [[word:shĂŠpapan|shĂŠpapan]] || [[word:kĂŠpapan|kĂŠpapan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathapapan|thathapapan]] || [[word:jajapapan|jajapapan]] || [[word:shashapapan|shashapapan]] || [[word:kakapapan|kakapapan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thapapan|thapapan]] || [[word:japapan|japapan]] || [[word:shapapan|shapapan]] || [[word:kapapan|kapapan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thapapan|thapapan]] || [[word:japapan|japapan]] || [[word:shapapan|shapapan]] || [[word:kapapan|kapapan]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shapapan|shapapan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshapapan|goshapapan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishapapan|gokishapapan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shapapanĂŒ|shapapanĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshapapanknĂŒ|goshapapanknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishapapanĂŒ|gokishapapanĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shapapanshĂ«|shapapanshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshapapankshĂ«|goshapapankshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishapapanshĂ«|gokishapapanshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapapanro|shapapanro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapapankro|goshapapankro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapapanro|gokishapapanro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shapapanmu|shapapanmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapapankmu|goshapapankmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapapanmu|gokishapapanmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shapapansher|shapapansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshapapanksher|goshapapanksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishapapansher|gokishapapansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shapapang|shapapang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshapapankng|goshapapankng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishapapang|gokishapapang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shapapanya|shapapanya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshapapankya|goshapapankya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishapapanya|gokishapapanya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shapapanyam|shapapanyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshapapankyam|goshapapankyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishapapanyam|gokishapapanyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapapanĂŒshĂ«|shapapanĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapapanknĂŒshĂ«|goshapapanknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapapanĂŒshĂ«|gokishapapanĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapapanĂŒro|shapapanĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapapanknĂŒro|goshapapanknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapapanĂŒro|gokishapapanĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapapanĂŒmu|shapapanĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapapanknĂŒmu|goshapapanknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapapanĂŒmu|gokishapapanĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapapanshĂ«nĂŒ|shapapanshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapapankshĂ«nĂŒ|goshapapankshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapapanshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishapapanshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapapanshĂ«ro|shapapanshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapapankshĂ«ro|goshapapankshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapapanshĂ«ro|gokishapapanshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapapanshĂ«mu|shapapanshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapapankshĂ«mu|goshapapankshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapapanshĂ«mu|gokishapapanshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapapanronĂŒ|shapapanronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapapankronĂŒ|goshapapankronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapapanronĂŒ|gokishapapanronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapapanroshĂ«|shapapanroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapapankroshĂ«|goshapapankroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapapanroshĂ«|gokishapapanroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapapanromu|shapapanromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapapankromu|goshapapankromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapapanromu|gokishapapanromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapapanmunĂŒ|shapapanmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapapankmunĂŒ|goshapapankmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapapanmunĂŒ|gokishapapanmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapapanmushĂ«|shapapanmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapapankmushĂ«|goshapapankmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapapanmushĂ«|gokishapapanmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapapanmuro|shapapanmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapapankmuro|goshapapankmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapapanmuro|gokishapapanmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|27df60f}}
